subcodes.first_line: A Tablet revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the Mighty, the Beloved, who was named Riḍá in the Book of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله العزیز المحبوب الذی سمی برضا فی کتاب الاسمآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @knowledge; recognition of God
